texte_auto: Ayon nuhida ekongu dibulbedu debeng ekarama koopeng. Siyoti habbiri o jangadu awli stifta. Bihen nung. Imamu oba oba awo o jangadu awli stifta. Yani sabunatabiti e hadis nula adola salara salama, nula adola hadisi habbiri bededgita he said. Si bededgiti sahaba en nung hadinuhumpa an nukur kul nula adawadata long. ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ ǐ
texte_corrige: Ayon nuhida ekongu dibulbedu debeng ekarama koopeng. Siyoti habbiri o jangadu awli stifta. Bihen nung. Imamu oba oba awo o jangadu awli stifta. Yani sabunatabiti e hadis nula adola salara salama, nula adola hadisi habbiri bededgita he said. Si bededgiti sahaba en nung hadinuhumpa an nukur kul nula adawadata long.
